title: Retail: A retail property has a gross income of 800000 and...
summary: Calculate property value using the capitalization rate and NOI.
prompt: A retail property has a gross income of $800,000 and expenses of $300,000. If the property is appraised at a cap rate of 9%, what is the estimated value of the property?
solution: Step 1: Calculate NOI: NOI = Gross Income - Expenses = $800,000 - $300,000 = $500,000. Step 2: Calculate property value using the cap rate: Property Value = NOI / Cap Rate = $500,000 / 0.09 = $5,555,555.56.
